Recent Commission Actions

March 18, 2026 Action of the Executive Committee of the Commission

Actions Following March 5-6, 2026 Meeting

For more information on the basis for final decisions to grant or reaffirm accreditation, please click here.

March 18, 2026 Action of the Executive Committee of the Commission

(posted March 31, 2026)

On March 18, 2026, the Executive Committee, acting on behalf of the New England Commission of Higher Education, considered the information submitted by Labouré College of Healthcare, Inc. and took the following action:

Accepted Teach-Out Plan
  • Labouré College of Healthcare, Inc., Milton, MA

Actions Following March 5-6, 2026 Meeting

(posted March 23, 2026)

At its meeting on March 5-6, 2026 the New England Commission of Higher Education took the following actions:

Asked to Show Cause for Probation or Withdrawal of Accreditation for not meeting the Standard on Institutional Resources
  • Hampshire College, Amherst, MA (letter dated March 23, 2026)
Accepted Comprehensive Evaluations
  • College Unbound, Providence, RI (next review Fall 2035)
  • Gordon-Conwell Theological Seminary, South Hamilton, MA (next review Fall 2035)
  • Lebanese American University, Beirut, Lebanon (next review Fall 2035)
Accepted Focused Evaluation Visits
  • Regis College, Weston, MA
  • Saint Joseph’s College of Maine, Standish, ME
Accepted Initial Accreditation Reports
  • Holy Spirit University of Kaslik, Mount Lebanon, Lebanon
  • Upper Valley Educators Institute, Lebanon, NH
Accepted Application for Candidacy
  • American University of the Middle East, Egaila, Kuwait
Accepted Applicant Visit
  • Bard College, Annandale-on-Hudson, NY
Accepted Interim Reports
  • Assumption University, Worcester, MA
  • Massachusetts Maritime Academy, Buzzards Bay, MA
  • Simmons University, Boston, MA
Accepted Progress Reports
  • Harvard University, Cambridge, MA
  • Hebrew College, Newton, MA
  • University of North America, Fairfax, VA
  • Washington County Community College, Calais, ME
Accepted Visits to Validate Substantive Change
  • Assumption University, Worcester, MA
  • Boston College, Boston, MA
  • Harvard University, Cambridge, MA
  • Massasoit Community College, Brockton, MA
  • University of New Haven, West Haven, CT
Accepted Eligibility Reports
  • Ashesi University, Accra, Ghana
  • FLAME University, Pune, India
Accepted Progress Reports
  • American International College, Springfield, MA
  • American University of Florence, Florence, Italy
  • Assumption University, Worcester, MA
  • Bennington College, Bennington, VT
  • Cambridge College, Boston, MA
  • Curry College, Milton, MA
  • Franklin Pierce University, Rindge, NH
  • Harvard University, Cambridge, MA
  • Hebrew College, Newton, MA
  • Labouré College of Healthcare, Inc., Milton, MA
  • Lesley University, Cambridge, MA
  • Montserrat College of Art, Beverly, MA
  • Notre Dame University-Louaize, Zouk Mosbeh, Lebanon
  • Paris University, Paris, France
  • Saint John’s Seminary, Brighton, MA
  • Simmons University, Boston, MA
  • Thomas College, Waterville, ME
  • University of Massachusetts System, Boston, MA
  • Western New England University, Springfield, MA
Deferred Progress Reports
  • Anna Maria College, Paxton, MA
  • Nichols College, Dudley, MA
Accepted Substantive Change Proposals
  • American University of Florence, Florence, Italy
  • Bay Path University, Longmeadow, MA
  • Clark University, Worcester, MA (School of Record)
  • Clark University, Worcester, MA (Dual degree Clark/HFUT)
  • Colby-Sawyer college, New London, NH
  • College of Our Lady of the Elms, Chicopee, MA
  • Curry College, Milton, MA
  • Nichols College, Dudley, MA
  • Northeastern University, Boston, MA
  • Paris University, Paris, France
  • Quincy College, Quincy, MA
  • The American University of Greece, Athens, Greece
  • The European Graduate School, Visp, Switzerland
  • University of Massachusetts Dartmouth, North Dartmouth, MA
  • University of New Hampshire, Durham, NH
  • University of New Haven, West Haven, CT
  • Wheaton College, Norton, MA
Deferred Substantive Change Proposals
  • University of Bridgeport, Bridgeport, CT
Accepted Teach-Out Plan
  • MGH Institute of Health Professionals, Boston, MA (instructional site at Alfaisal University)
Accepted Requested Information Report
  • Rivier University, Nashua, NH

February 20, 2026 Action of the Executive Committee of the Commission

(posted February 23, 2026)

On February 20, 2026, the Executive Committee, acting on behalf of the New England Commission of Higher Education, considered the information submitted by Labouré College of Healthcare, Inc. and took the following action:

Accepted Voluntary Withdrawal of Accreditation
  • Labouré College of Healthcare, Inc., Milton, MA

December 8, 2025 Action of the Executive Committee of the Commission

(posted December 18, 2025)

On December 8, 2025, the Executive Committee, acting on behalf of the New England Commission of Higher Education, took the following action:

Accepted Teach-Out Plan
  • Sterling College, Craftsbury Common, VT

Actions Following November 20-21, 2025 Meeting

(posted December 17, 2025)

At its meeting on November 20-21, 2025 the New England Commission of Higher Education took the following actions:

Accepted Comprehensive Evaluations
  • Maine College of Art & Design, Portland, ME (next review Spring 2035)
  • Massachusetts Bay Community College, Wellesley Hills, MA (next review Spring 2035)
  • Massachusetts College of Art and Design, Boston, MA (next review Spring 2035)
  • University of Massachusetts Boston, Boston, MA (next review Spring 2035)
  • Urban College of Boston, Boston, MA (next review Spring 2035)
Granted Candidacy
  • Habib University, Karachi, Pakistan
Granted Eligibility
  • Bahçeşehir University, İstanbul, Turkey
Accepted Focused Evaluation Visit Reports
  • University of Hartford, West Hartford, CT
Accepted Interim Reports
  • College of the Holy Cross, Worcester, MA
  • Eastern Connecticut State University, Willimantic, CT
  • Greenfield Community College, Greenfield, MA
  • Norwich University, Northfield, VT
  • Perrotis College, Thessaloniki, Greece
  • Saint Michael’s College, Colchester, VT
  • Springfield College, Springfield, MA
Accepted Progress Reports
  • Curry College, Milton, MA
  • Dean College, Franklin, MA
  • EHL Hospitality Business School, Lausanne, Switzerland
  • Framingham State University, Framingham, MA
  • Hampshire College, Amherst, MA
  • Maine College of Health Professions, Lewiston, ME
  • Montserrat College of Art, Beverly, MA
  • SIT, Brattleboro, VT
Progress Report Not Approved
  • University of North America, Fairfax, VA
Accepted Substantive Change Implementation Reports
  • Bay Atlantic University, Washington, DC
  • Bunker Hill Community College, Boston, MA
  • Endicott College, Beverly, MA
  • Franklin Pierce University, Rindge, NH
  • Les Roches Global Hospitality Education, Crans Montana, Switzerland
  • Post University, Waterbury, CT
  • University of Massachusetts Chan Medical School, Worcester, MA
Accepted Substantive Change Proposals
  • American University of Madaba, Madaba, Jordan
  • Bennington College, Bennington, VT
  • Boston College, Boston, MA
  • Fairfield University, Fairfield, CT
  • Maine Maritime Academy, Castine, ME
  • New England College, Henniker, NH
  • Roger Williams University, Bristol, RI
  • The American University of Greece, Athens, Greece
  • White Mountains Community College, Berlin, NH
  • William James College, Newton, MA
  • Woodmont College, North Miami Beach, FL
Accepted Requested Information Reports
  • Harvard University, Cambridge, MA
Accepted Teach-Out Plans
  • Boston University, Boston, MA (Master of Social Work degree at its Bedford, Cape Cod, and Fall River locations)
  • Gordon College, Wenham, MA (Associate of Arts in Bible and Theology for Northpoint Bible College Students)
  • Middlebury College, Middlebury, VT (Middlebury Institute of International Studies at Monterey, CA)
  • Southern New Hampshire University, Manchester, NH (Latin American and India Programs)
Accepted Notification of Institutional Closure
  • Sterling College, Craftsbury Common, VT 
Accepted Innovation Proposals
  • Keene State College, Keene, NH
  • Rivier University, Nashua, NH
  • University of Maine System, Orono, ME
Accepted Complaint
  • Rivier University, Nashua, NH

Actions Following September 25-26, 2025 Meeting

(posted October 22, 2025)

At its meeting on September 25-26, 2025 the New England Commission of Higher Education took the following actions:

Accepted Comprehensive Evaluations
  • Colby-Sawyer College, New London, NH (Next review Spring 2035)
  • Conway School of Landscape Design, Northampton, MA (Next review Spring 2035)
  • Roxbury Community college, Roxbury Crossing, MA (Next review Spring 2035)
Accepted Focused Evaluation Visits
  • Connecticut State Community College, Hartford, CT
  • Mitchell College, New London, CT
  • Vermont College of Fine Arts, Montpelier, VT
Granted Initial Accreditation
  • American University of Florence, Florence, Italy (Next review Spring 2030)
Granted Candidacy
  • African Leadership College of Higher Ed, Pamplemousses, Mauritius
Accepted Interim Reports
  • Bates College, Lewiston, ME
  • Holyoke Community College, Holyoke, MA
  • Keene State College, Keene, NH
  • Northern Essex Community College, Haverhill, MA
  • Rhode Island College, Providence, RI
  • Saint John’s Seminary, Brighton, MA
  • United States Coast Guard Academy, New London, CT
  • University of New Haven, West Haven, CT
Accepted Progress Reports
  • Anna Maria College, Paxton, MA
  • College of Our Lady of the Elms, Chicopee, MA
  • Fairfield University, Fairfield, CT
  • Husson University, Bangor, ME
  • Quinnipiac University, Hamden, CT
  • Thomas College, Waterville, ME
  • University of Maine System, Orono, ME
Accepted Visits to Validate Substantive Change
  • Bay Path University, Longmeadow, MA
  • Bennington College, Bennington, VT
  • Community College of Vermont, Montpelier, VT
  • New England College, Henniker, NH
  • Paris College of Art, Paris, France
  • Unity Environmental University, New Gloucester, ME
  • Wheaton College, Norton, MA
Accepted Requested Information Reports
  • Benjamin Franklin Cummings Institute of Technology, Boston, MA
  • Harvard University, Cambridge, MA
  • Husson University, Bangor, ME
  • MCPHS University, Boston, MA
  • University of New Hampshire, Durham, NH
Accepted Substantive Change Proposals
  • Bay Path University, Longmeadow, MA
  • Clark University, Worcester, MA
  • Gordon College, Wenham, MA
  • Great Bay Community College, Portsmouth, NH
  • Lasell University, Newton, MA
  • Lebanese American University, Beirut, Lebanon
  • Massachusetts School of Law at Andover, Andover, MA
  • Norwich University, Northfield, VT
  • Saint Anselm College, Manchester, NH
  • University of Maine System, Orono, ME (two proposals)
Accepted Innovation Proposal
  • Unity Environmental University, New Gloucester, ME
Innovation Proposal Not Approved
  • Johnson & Wales University, Providence, RI
Accepted Complaint
  • New England Commission of Higher Education, Wakefield, MA

July 24, 2025 Action of the Executive Committee of the Commission

(posted August 4, 2025)

On July 24, 2025, the Executive Committee, acting on behalf of the New England Commission of Higher Education, took the following action:

Accepted Substantive Change Proposal - Distance Education
  • Bennington College, Bennington, VT
Accepted Innovation Proposal
  • Harvard University, Cambridge, MA

Actions Following June 5-6, 2025 Meeting

(posted June 25, 2025)

At its meeting on June 5-6, 2025 the New England Commission of Higher Education took the following actions:

Accepted Substantive Change Proposal
  • Maine Media College, Rockport, ME
Accepted Teach Out Plan
  • Framingham State University, Framingham, MA (closure of ten international locations)
Accepted Complaints
  • Framingham State University, Framingham, MA

Actions Following April 24-25, 2025 Meeting

(posted May 19, 2025)

At its meeting on April 24-25, 2025 the New England Commission of Higher Education took the following actions:

Accepted Comprehensive Evaluations
  • Nichols College, Dudley, MA (next review Fall 2034)
  • University of Bridgeport, Bridgeport, CT (next review Spring 2035)
Granted Accreditation
  • Sarah Lawrence College, Bronxville, NY (next review Spring 2030)
Granted Candidacy
  • Ralston College, Savannah, GA
Accepted Interim Reports
  • Bunker Hill Community College, Boston, MA
  • Goodwin University, East Hartford, CT
  • University of Massachusetts Dartmouth, North Dartmouth, MA
Accepted Focused Evaluation Visit Reports
  • Lasell University, Newton, MA
  • Saint Michael’s College, Colchester, VT
  • Vermont State University, Randolph, VT
  • Wentworth Institute of Technology, Boston, MA
Accepted Progress Reports
  • Bay Atlantic University, Washington, DC
  • Benjamin Franklin Cummings Institute of Technology, Boston, MA
  • Berkshire Community College, Pittsfield, MA
  • Champlain College, Burlington, VT

  • Hobart and William Smith Colleges, Geneva, NY

  • Mitchell College, New London, CT
  • Mount Wachusett Community College, Gardner, MA

  • Saint Joseph’s College of Maine, Standish, ME
  • Upper Valley Educators Institute, Lebanon, NH
  • Vermont College of Fine Arts, Montpelier, VT
  • Vermont Law & Graduate School, South Royalton, VT
  • Woodmont College, North Miami Beach, FL
  • Worcester State University, Worcester, MA

  • Benjamin Franklin Cummings Institute of Technology, Boston, MA
  • Boston College, Boston, MA
  • Effat University, Jeddah, Saudi Arabia
  • Hellenic American University, Athens, Greece

  • Mount Wachusett Community College, Gardner, MA
  • Paris College of Art, Paris, France

  • Nichols College, Dudley, MA
Accepted Teach-Out Plan
  • Quincy College, Quincy, MA (Medical Laboratory Technician Program)
Deferred Teach-Out Plan
  • Framingham State University, Framingham, MA (closure of ten international locations)
